# TachiyomiAT

> Android manga and manhwa translation with hosted OCR, clean translation, monthly token plans, redeem-code activation, and APK download.

TachiyomiAT is a reader-focused Android app and hosted backend for translating manga and manhwa pages. The public website explains the service, pricing, download path, activation flow, support options, privacy policy, and terms.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://tachiyomiat.com/): Product overview for hosted manga and manhwa OCR translation.
- [Download](https://tachiyomiat.com/download): Android APK download and setup guidance.
- [Pricing](https://tachiyomiat.com/pricing): Monthly token plans for hosted OCR and translation.
- [How it works](https://tachiyomiat.com/how-it-works): Checkout, redeem-code activation, device binding, OCR, and translation flow.
- [Support](https://tachiyomiat.com/support): Help for billing, activation, setup, and service questions.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/privacy): Data processed for OCR, translation, source discovery, checkout, activation, and support.
- [Terms of Service](https://tachiyomiat.com/legal/terms): Service rules for token packs, redeem codes, app activation, and translation processing.

## Machine-readable resources

- [Sitemap](https://tachiyomiat.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://tachiyomiat.com/robots.txt)
- [Full LLM context](https://tachiyomiat.com/llms-full.txt)

## Crawl notes

Checkout, login, app, manager, logout, and API routes are not intended for search indexing. TachiyomiAT does not host manga chapters; it provides OCR, translation, activation, and support infrastructure for the Android app.
